texto: Like many children of the rich and famous, Paris Hilton didn't always get to spend quality time with her parents, especially her mother. A socially ambitious young woman, Kathleen Elizabeth Avanzino Richards Hilton, who had married into the celebrated Hilton Hotel family, was often out and about.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Jerry Oppenheimer: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “Like many children of the rich and famous, Paris Hilton didn't always get to spend quality time w…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que familia, family, time pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de termino e time.
